analysis: Extended the pre-training curriculum to 10 epochs on 10,000 synthetic geometric shapes. The pre-training loss successfully minimized to 0.0015, heavily overfitting the synthetic task. When fine-tuned on the real BraTS dataset, the model collapsed entirely, predicting exactly 0.5 for all samples (AUC = 0.5000). This indicates catastrophic interference or dying ReLUs — the network became too specialized to the pure geometric noise distributions, completely destroying the generic low-level filters needed to adapt to real multi-parametric MRI textures. A moderate pre-training regime (like Iteration 2) is crucial.
